proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is losing over 10,000 hours a year on manual proposal writing. Let's reclaim that time.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, Gmail spends hours crafting proposals. Our system delivers polished, branded proposals in just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each of these problems represents a drain on Gmail's resources and potential revenue.

problems.title: Time Wasted
problems.description: Every hour spent on proposal writing is an hour not spent improving Gmail's services. This translates to thousands of hours annually.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manually created proposals risk inconsistent messaging. This inconsistency can lead to misrepresentation, costing Gmail credibility.

problems.title: Delayed Responses
problems.description: Proposals that take days to prepare can delay deal closures. Each delay can cost Gmail potential clients.

problems.title: Increased Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying employees to draft proposals instead of focusing on innovation incurs unnecessary expenses. This affects Gmail's bottom line.

problems.title: Lost Competitive Edge
problems.description: Manual processes slow down Gmail's ability to react to market opportunities. Every missed opportunity is a potential revenue loss.

problems.title: Proposal Errors
problems.description: Human errors in proposals can lead to miscommunication and potential client loss. This can damage Gmail's reputation.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces the inefficiencies and costs associated with manual proposal creation.

solutions.title: Automated Proposal Drafting
solutions.description: Currently, drafting proposals is a time-consuming task. Our system automates this, delivering proposals in under a minute.

solutions.title: Consistent Brand Messaging
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk inconsistent branding. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Gmail's brand voice.

solutions.title: Rapid Client Response
solutions.description: Gmail's current process delays responses. Our system's speed allows Gmail to respond to prospects almost instantly.

solutions.title: Reduced Labor Costs
solutions.description: Manual proposal writing incurs high labor costs. Our automation reduces these expenses significantly.

solutions.title: Error-Free Proposals
solutions.description: Human errors are common in manual proposals. Our AI generates error-free documents, enhancing Gmail's reliability.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Communication with Gmail's Seamless Email Solutions.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Engage your team with Gmail's intuitive email platform. A streamlined approach to enhance productivity and efficiency.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant losses due to inefficient communication systems.

problems.title: Email Overload
problems.description: Without effective email filtering, employees spend 3 hours weekly managing spam. This reduces productivity and increases operational costs.

problems.title: Storage Limitations
problems.description: Current email storage caps limit historical data access, causing a 15% delay in decision-making processes.

problems.title: Mobile Inaccessibility
problems.description: Lack of mobile access to emails leads to missed opportunities, with 20% of client queries unanswered outside office hours.

problems.title: Security Risks
problems.description: Inadequate email security results in a 10% annual increase in data breaches, risking client trust and potential revenue.

problems.title: Poor Collaboration
problems.description: Ineffective email collaboration tools lead to 25% slower project turnaround times, impacting client satisfaction.

problems.title: Limited Integrations
problems.description: Current systems' inability to integrate with other platforms results in a 30% increase in manual data entry errors.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these losses, enhancing efficiency and security.

solutions.title: Gmail's Spam Filtering
solutions.description: Reduces email overload by effectively managing spam, improving employee focus and productivity.

solutions.title: Gmail Storage
solutions.description: Provides 15 GB of storage per user, ensuring seamless access to historical email data and improving decision-making.

solutions.title: Mobile Access
solutions.description: Enables full email access on mobile devices, ensuring timely responses to client queries anytime, anywhere.

solutions.title: Enhanced Security
solutions.description: Advanced security measures protect sensitive data, reducing the risk of breaches and maintaining client trust.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Gmail is the trusted choice for efficient and secure communication.

whyUsCards.title: Global Reach
whyUsCards.description: Used by millions worldwide, Gmail ensures reliable and consistent communication across borders.

whyUsCards.title: Cutting-Edge Technology
whyUsCards.description: Our platform is built on the latest technology, ensuring top-notch performance and security.

whyUsCards.title: Customer Support
whyUsCards.description: Our dedicated support team is available 24/7 to assist with any issues or questions.

whyUsCards.title: Custom Solutions
whyUsCards.description: Tailored solutions to fit your unique business needs, optimizing your email strategy.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team dedicated to your success.

team.name: there
team.bio: Leading strategy and client relationships with a focus on effective communication solutions. Ensures tailored strategies that align with client objectives.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Planning
process.description: Understanding your business needs and planning a custom email strategy.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Deploying Gmail solutions tailored to your business.

process.title: Optimization
process.description: Fine-tuning the solutions for maximum efficiency.

process.title: Ongoing Support
process.description: Continuous support and optimization to ensure sustained success.

pricing.name: Basic Package
pricing.description: Essential email solutions to enhance basic communication.

pricing.name: Pro Package
pricing.description: Comprehensive email solutions including enhanced security features.
